content: Francis Ford Coppola directed "The Godfather" in 1972. The film, based on Mario Puzo's novel, starred Marlon Brando and Al Pacino and is widely considered one of the greatest movies ever made.
raw_content: Francis Ford Coppola directed "The Godfather" in 1972. The film, based on Mario Puzo's novel, starred Marlon Brando and Al Pacino and is widely considered one of the greatest movies ever made.
